s: In 2010, Jordan Walden suited up for LAA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.350, WHIP 1.300, SO 23, WAR 0.400.
In 2011, Jordan Walden suited up for LAA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.980, WHIP 1.240, SO 67, WAR 1.400.
In 2012, Jordan Walden suited up for LAA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.460, WHIP 1.360, SO 48, WAR 0.500.
Changed teams after the previous season (LAA -> ATL).
In 2013, Jordan Walden suited up for ATL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.450, WHIP 1.130, SO 54, WAR 0.800. Notable context: Joined ATL.
In 2014, Jordan Walden suited up for ATL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.880, WHIP 1.200, SO 62, WAR 0.800.
Changed teams after the previous season (ATL -> STL).
In 2015, Jordan Walden suited up for STL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 0.870, WHIP 1.060, SO 12, WAR 0.400. Notable context: Joined STL.
